parameters.query:
INSERT INTO audit_logs (session_id, question_id, step_name, status, message, percentage, created_at)
VALUES ('{{ $json.sessionId }}', NULL, 'queued', 'in_progress', '{{ "Job queued: " + $json.questions.length + " questions, " + $json.totalFiles + " files" }}', 0, NOW());
UPDATE audit_sessions SET job_id = '{{ $json.jobId }}' WHERE session_id = '{{ $json.sessionId }}';
